calendar.matters:
Petition Of Katherine Louise Grimes For Order Confirming Title Of Personal Property To Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Hall for (petitioner) Katherine Grimes.

The Court stated that it has concerns regarding the salient facts in terms of timing of the sale and records and requested counsel submit a declaration for further support. Mr. Hall stated that he realizes that this does not fit a Heggstad and that he could get additional details from the petitioner. The Court requested that a declaration or affidavit be filed within 3 weeks, no later than January 25, 2016 and that the petition for order confirming title of personal property to revocable living trust will be taken under submission at that time.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy C. Robles. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Katherine Louise Grimes For Order Confirming Title Of Personal Property To Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Continued To Dec-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
